title: Iranecio davisii
intro: Iranecio davisii, also known as Davis's fleabane or a type of fleabane daisy, is a perennial plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is believed to have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects, which may aid in the treatment of various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory infections. The bioactive constituents of Iranecio davisii include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and sesquiterpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Iranecio davisii is often used to make tea, infusions, and decoctions, which are commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote health and well-being.
